expectations.text: CMS block has German labels + admin descriptions
expectations.evidence: Eyebrow default 'Vertrauen', admin copy nudges curation over completeness.

expectations.text: CMS block has logos[] with image (required), name (required), optional href
expectations.evidence: minRows:3, maxRows:12. Each item has logo (Media), name (alt+aria), optional href.

expectations.text: Astro renderer adds to discriminated union and has render branch
expectations.evidence: New clientLogosStrip branch added between linkList and ctaBlock.

expectations.text: Styling references design tokens (no hardcoded colors)
Logos at uniform height with auto width
Default state desaturates / mutes logos (treatment: monochrome)
expectations.evidence: grayscale+brightness+contrast filter, base opacity 0.78. Hover lifts to full opacity/color over 0.6s — same slow easing as chapter grid.

expectations.text: No card shadows or rounded corners > 4px
Explanation references existing block patterns by name
expectations.evidence: References audience__grid, mr-cities__grid, chapter grid — multiple anchors.
EXPLANATION explicitly states: 'Headline — <em> steel-grey, exactly like BILDER, DIE EINEN RAUM VERÄNDERN.' Directly cites the calibration anchor from SKILL.md.
Opening line: 'Not a trusted by sponsor wall.' Eyebrow choice 'Vertrauen' is a bit closer to trust-badge than iter 1's 'Auftraggeber' but framing is editorial.
'Single opacity/filter transition, killed under prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.'

notes: Iteration improvement: explicitly cites the new calibration anchor from updated SKILL.md ('BILDER, DIE EINEN RAUM VERÄNDERN.'). Uses var(--accent-2) for headline em — implementing the corrected accent system. Treatment select ('monochrome' default + 'original' opt-out) is a nice generalization over iter 1's mandatory monochrome.
